caption: A football game is played on a green field under bright lights, with a digital broadcast overlay at the top showing "1st & 10", "14", "EXO 7", "3rd", "47", and ":30". The text "SUPER BOWL CHAMPIONS" and "Q. SMITH 1516, 123 YDS, 1 TD, 1 INT" are also visible. A player in a white jersey and helmet carries the ball while being pursued by defenders in black jerseys; one defender wears number 17 and another wears number 43. In the bottom left of each frame, a smaller window shows a blonde man in a blue shirt wearing a headset. As the action progresses, the player in white moves forward while the defender in jersey 43 closes in. The background features a crowd in the stands and other players scattered across the field.
